evals.prompt: /update-codemaps Refresh architecture codemaps for this repository after the auth refactor.
evals.expected_output: Scans repo structure, updates token-lean codemaps under docs/CODEMAPS or existing codemap directory, writes freshness markers, and reports changed/skipped files.
assertions: Identifies project type, source roots, entry points, and major boundaries before writing codemaps.
Creates or updates architecture/backend/frontend/data/dependencies maps only when relevant.
Keeps codemaps concise with paths, symbols, tables, or ASCII diagrams instead of source dumps.
Writes or describes .reports/codemap-diff.txt with architecture changes and staleness warnings.
expectations: Identifies project type, source roots, entry points, and major boundaries before writing codemaps.

Keeps codemaps concise with paths, symbols, tables, or ASCII diagrams instead of source dumps.
Writes or describes .reports/codemap-diff.txt with architecture changes and staleness warnings.

evals.prompt: Generate AI-readable codemaps for a monorepo with apps/web, apps/api, and packages/db.
evals.expected_output: Maps workspace-level boundaries plus relevant app/package responsibilities without dumping implementation details.
assertions: Detects monorepo shape and records app/package boundaries.
Documents frontend, backend, data, and dependency flows where present.
Uses token-lean codemap format and freshness metadata.
Skips irrelevant codemap files with a reason instead of creating empty documents.
expectations: Detects monorepo shape and records app/package boundaries.
Documents frontend, backend, data, and dependency flows where present.
Uses token-lean codemap format and freshness metadata.
Skips irrelevant codemap files with a reason instead of creating empty documents.

evals.prompt: Update existing codemaps, but ask before overwriting if the architecture changed a lot.
evals.expected_output: Drafts replacements, estimates diff size, asks before overwriting files with more than 30% change, and updates smaller diffs in place.
assertions: Uses a 30% change threshold for approval.
Still updates safe smaller changes and writes the codemap diff report.
expectations: Uses a 30% change threshold for approval.
Still updates safe smaller changes and writes the codemap diff report.

evals.prompt: /update-codemaps No docs/CODEMAPS directory exists, but .reports/codemaps exists from ECC.
evals.expected_output: Preserves the existing .reports/codemaps location instead of creating tracked docs/CODEMAPS by default.
assertions: Writes codemaps to .reports/codemaps rather than creating docs/CODEMAPS.
Reports that the ECC generated-artifact location was preserved.
